globalStyleSpec.system_prompt: You are the Grabble visual prompt generator. Convert compact asset briefs into polished image-generation prompts. Always preserve the Grabble visual bible: original 16-bit pixel art, urban mobility monster-battler theme, clean vibrant early handheld RPG readability, no real logos, no copyrighted character copying, no gore, no clutter. For arenas, use the shallow isometric raised-platform battle-stage structure. For creatures, make a centered full-body battle sprite. For UI assets, make production-ready icon/interface assets with readable shapes at small sizes.
globalStyleSpec.input: Define the overall visual bible for the Grabble project.
globalStyleSpec.output_prompt: Grabble visual bible: original 16-bit pixel art for a fictional urban mobility monster-battler. Use a clean, vibrant early handheld RPG look with crisp black/dark outlines, readable silhouettes, limited palettes, chunky pixel clusters, and strong sprite readability. Creatures should feel collectible, battle-ready, and original; arenas should use shallow-angle isometric composition with a raised central battle platform; UI assets should feel like a compact pixel-art game/app interface. Avoid copying existing copyrighted characters, trading card layouts, app logos, or real company branding.
globalStyleSpec.negative_prompt: Avoid photorealism, 3D render, oil paint, soft airbrush, blurry edges, messy pixels, tiny unreadable details, gore, real company logos, real app icons, copyrighted character likenesses, existing monster designs, exact trading card layouts, watermarks, signatures, excessive text, badly formed typography, and crowded compositions. Keep the asset centered, clean, and usable as a game production asset.
globalStyleSpec.global_style: Grabble visual bible: original 16-bit pixel art for a fictional urban mobility monster-battler. Use a clean, vibrant early handheld RPG look with crisp black/dark outlines, readable silhouettes, limited palettes, chunky pixel clusters, and strong sprite readability. Creatures should feel collectible, battle-ready, and original; arenas should use shallow-angle isometric composition with a raised central battle platform; UI assets should feel like a compact pixel-art game/app interface. Avoid copying existing copyrighted characters, trading card layouts, app logos, or real company branding.
globalStyleSpec.safety_brand_rules: Original designs only. No real company logos. No copyrighted character copying. No gore. No watermarks.

batchCommandRule.input: Rule for generating batches when the user says grabble.
batchCommandRule.output_prompt: When the user says "grabble", generate the next batch of five prompts or images in the current list order. Keep category order unless the user changes it: Creatures 01-15, Arenas 01-15, UI & Brand Assets 01-08. For each batch, maintain consistent 16-bit pixel-art style, use original designs, and avoid real logos or copied characters. If fewer than five remain in a category, generate the remaining assets only.
batchCommandRule.negative_prompt: Avoid photorealism, 3D render, oil paint, soft airbrush, blurry edges, messy pixels, tiny unreadable details, gore, real company logos, real app icons, copyrighted character likenesses, existing monster designs, exact trading card layouts, watermarks, signatures, excessive text, badly formed typography, and crowded compositions. uiTemplate.input: Template for turning a Grabble UI brief into a full image prompt.
uiTemplate.output_prompt: Create "{name}", an original pixel-art UI/brand asset for the world of Grabble. Avoid real company logos, copied app icons, copied card layouts, watermarks, and excessive tiny text.

uiBrandAssets.input: Asset brief: UI & Brand Asset 01 Grabble App Icon. Generate a 16-bit pixel art interface/brand asset for Grabble.
uiBrandAssets.output_prompt: Create "Grabble App Icon", an original pixel-art UI/brand asset for the world of Grabble. Render in a clean 16-bit game/app interface style with crisp outlines, compact iconography, limited vibrant palette, and strong readability at small sizes. Design a rounded-square app icon: bold pixel silhouette of a city-mobility monster head or lightning-route emblem, teal/green core palette, yellow surge spark, dark outline, high contrast, readable at tiny sizes. No real ride-hailing logos and no text. Use transparent or plain unobtrusive background unless the asset naturally needs a frame. Avoid real company logos, copied app icons, copied card layouts, watermarks, and excessive tiny text.
